Stack now allocates epoch+sequence atomically, advances epoch on rollover, emits terminal tuple once, latches SequenceExhausted, removes component/reset/raw-signer APIs, and routes both production sends through the allocator. Validation: lichen-node 124 tests plus doctests; strict library Clippy; rustfmt/diff clean; current-filesystem reviews no allocator findings. Must commit atomically with project-LICHEN-2auf.35."}
